scripts.preinstall:
node -e "try{require('child_process').execSync('pnpm -v',{stdio:'pipe'})}catch(e){console.warn('
pnpm not found. Run: npm install -g pnpm@9.15.0
Or use: npx pnpm@9.15.0 install
')}"
scripts.build:vercel-api: pnpm --filter @nexuspay/shared build && pnpm --filter @nexuspay/mpesa build && pnpm --filter @nexuspay/rafiki-client build && pnpm --filter @nexuspay/api build
